headline: Market Underestimating the Growth Potential of Automatic Data Processing (ADP), Says Guggenheim
summary: Automatic Data Processing, Inc. (NASDAQ:ADP) is one of the Best Stocks to Buy While the Market Is Down. On April 20, Guggenheim maintained a Buy rating on the stock with a price target of $270. The firm argues that the market is underestimating the growth potential of ADP, particularly its enterprise human capital management tool […]
